name: Ingest and Growth
description: Khoj is pleased to invite you to a talk by artist Rashmi Kaleka, Ingest and Growth, where she will speak about her practice and her ecological micro farm, Farm8. Drawing from her engagement with sound, patterns of habitation, and interspecies relationships, Rashmi’s work moves between image-making and ecological practice. In this talk, she will reflect […]

name: Sentience of Small Beings
description: Presented by NAU Foundation, Khoj is delighted to host Sentience of Small Beings, an exhibition that brings together 18 ceramic and printmaking artists from across the world to explore the world of insects and the vital role they play in sustaining life. Emerging from NAU’s art and ecology programme, the works invite a closer look […]
